title: Just a Gun
body:
Ever been bored by your limited arsenal of ranged weapons, but don't want tons of other guns, bullets, and would rather have more simplicity?

Well with Just a Gun, you can now have just a gun! Nothing more, nothing less.

This gun is the **Flintlock Pistol,** which shoots **Bullets,** _(duh)_, the recipes for both of which are in the **Gallery.**

If you shoot at any **living entity,** (like a pig or creeper, but no armor stands or paintings), you will deal **10** points, _(or 5 hearts)_, of damage!

But that's not all! The **Bullets** shot by the **Flintlock Pistol** are also able to break through **Glass, Glass Panes,** really _anything_ made of glass,* including from other mods!

Happy shooting!

*By this, I mean any block with "glass" in it's ID.
